justification: All 7 ACs covered with dedicated describe blocks. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (not error) for both payment methods. AC7 whitespace tested with '   ' (three spaces) plus tab/newline and single space variants. AC2 fee arithmetic verified numerically (refundAmount===amount-1.5, fee===1.5). Boundary values exact: 0 for AC4, 10001 for AC5, 10000 for AC6. No implementation changes — output states file was confirmed green with no content change. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs to test names. deviations section is empty.

observations.text: All 7 ACs mapped to explicit test names in acceptance_criteria_coverage
AC6 correctly tested as successful boundary (does not throw, returns approved) for both credit_card and bank_transfer
AC7 tests '   ' (three spaces) as required, plus additional whitespace variants
AC2 numerically verifies fee=1.5 and refundAmount=amount-1.5
AC4 tests exact 0 boundary plus negative value to confirm <= 0 guard
